description_long: Our MicroLending's website (ourmicrolending.com) is currently offline due to a Cloudflare 520 error, indicating a connection failure between Cloudflare's cache and the origin web server. Without access to the company's website content, service descriptions, terms, pricing, or operational details cannot be verified. The company is listed in the 'fix-my-credit' category, suggesting it may offer credit repair services involving dispute filing and negative item removal from credit reports. However, this categorization cannot be confirmed without reviewing actual website content. The persistent server error prevents assessment of what products or services are actually offered, who the company serves, what their fee structure is, or what distinguishes them from competitors. Until the website is restored and accessible, a factual company profile cannot be reliably constructed. Any profile generated without website verification would violate the requirement to base all information on verified company sources.
